ModMetaData.name: Pawn Diary: 1-2-3 Personalities
ModMetaData.author: aimmlegate
ModMetaData.description:
Bridges Pawn Diary and 1-2-3 Personalities so a colonist's Enneagram personality shapes their diary.
Two layers: - Personality-aware entries (XML, always on): Module 2's compatibility interactions (Harmonious / Diversive / Turmoil) and its personality mood thoughts are recorded in their own voice — the felt fit or friction between two people — instead of the generic "other" bucket. Module 2 is optional; these sit inert without it. - Personality as diary psychotype (this mod's assembly): one setting picks how a colonist's Enneagram shapes their EDITABLE Pawn Diary psychotype — off; map to the closest built-in psychotype; fill their custom outlook from built-in text; or (experimental) have your language model rewrite their personality into a compact outlook, on a chosen API lane with an editable prompt. What it writes is the normal, player-editable psychotype — tweak or clear it per pawn — and it refreshes when the personality changes. 1-2-3 Personalities supplies WHO the pawn is; Pawn Diary keeps HOW they write, and nothing is ever written back into 1-2-3 Personalities.
Requires Pawn Diary and 1-2-3 Personalities M1. Module 2 recommended for the full effect. Deployed as a separate RimWorld mod via scripts/deploy-integrations.ps1.
